step1.title: Welcome to LaTeX Agent
step1.description: LaTeX Agent is a powerful tool to help you write LaTeX documents with ease. Let's get started!

step2.title: Features Overview
step2.description: Our tool provides real-time preview, auto-completion, and intelligent suggestions to make your LaTeX writing experience smooth and efficient.

step3.title: Ready to Start
step3.description: You're all set! Click 'Finish' to begin your LaTeX writing journey.

main.title: LaTeX Agent
main.description: Welcome to your LaTeX writing workspace. Start by creating a new document or opening an existing one.
